data.body: Adversarial review: 15 findings total, 13 accepted, 2 rejected. Accepted findings applied as done definitions and considerations on stories 6121-46dc, 2629-66cb, 3c31-8050, 459e-62a8, e4c5-3aad, 769a-87cc. Key cross-story gaps addressed: Part C overlap clarification, interaction:deferred tag lifecycle, insertion point specification, provenance vs clean-text timing, usage-aware throttling for batching, sprint consumer impact, INTERACTIVITY_DEFERRED contract format.
